title: Weapons Purchased
query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(Price), 0) AS total, COUNT(*) AS purchases FROM BuyWeapon WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(Name_Localised, Name) AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM BuyWeapon WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY label ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {purchases} on-foot weapon(s) purchased for {total} Cr during the report period. Each weapon purchase marks a deliberate upgrade to your loadout — the distribution reveals which combat roles you've been investing in.
details.help: BuyWeapon fires on each on-foot weapon purchase. total drives the title as the spend amount is the headline metric.

tagLines: Weapon procurement records updated. Pilots Federation armourers note the volume of recent acquisitions.
The Manticore catalogue doesn't restock itself. Someone has to be buying all this.
Every weapon purchased is a theory about how the next engagement will go. The galaxy has opinions.
